steps.script: () => { const url = location.href; if (url.includes('login') || url.includes('passport')) { throw new Error('redirected to login page: ' + url); } return true; }

(html) => { const editor = document.querySelector('#editor .ql-editor'); if (!editor) { throw new Error('editor not found'); } editor.innerHTML = html; editor.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); editor.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); const container = document.querySelector('#editor .ql-container') || document.querySelector('#editor'); let quill = container && (container.__quill || window.quill); if (!quill && typeof Quill !== 'undefined' && container) { quill = Quill.find(container); } if (quill && typeof quill.update === 'function') { quill.update('user'); } return true; }

steps.prompt: 未能自动填写搜狐正文，请手动粘贴内容后点击继续

steps.script: () => { let btn = document.querySelector('li.publish-report-btn.active.positive-button'); if (!btn) { const all = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('li')); btn = all.find(el => /发布/.test(el.textContent)); } if (!btn) { throw new Error('submit button not found'); } btn.click(); return true; }

() => { const norm = (s) => (s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const isVisible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.display === 'none') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0; }; const dialog = document.querySelector('[role="dialog"], .modal, .dialog, .popup, .alert'); if (!dialog) return { skipped: true }; const btns = Array.from(dialog.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], a')).filter(isVisible); const confirm = btns.find(b => /确定|确认|同意|知道了|继续|发布/.test(norm(b.textContent || ''))); if (confirm) { confirm.click(); return { success: true, text: norm(confirm.textContent) }; } return { skipped: true }; }

steps.prompt: 搜狐发布时出现弹窗，请手动确认后点击继续
